overall.description: A first-person exploration of the Annesburg train station from Red Dead Redemption 2, beginning at a polluted riverbank with oil-slicked water, ascending to the railway tracks, passing NPC workers, and walking along the lumber-strewn platform to examine period-appropriate posters on the station wall during golden hour.

events.description: camera ascends from water level up the rocky riverbank

agents.ego_description: walking along the oil-slicked riverbank toward the railway area

entered.detail: water surface with rainbow-colored oil pollution reflecting the sky
muddy and debris-strewn shore with scattered rocks and trash
tall wooden electrical poles with crossbars and multiple wires
dense tree line covering the hills in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the edge of a river with rainbow-colored oil slicks on the water surface. The camera moves forward along the rocky, debris-strewn shore, passing wooden posts and approaching a railway embankment with utility poles visible against a forested backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: railway loading area with wooden platform

events.description: moves from riverbank up to the railway track level
passes two men sitting on the loading platform

agents.ego_description: ascending to the tracks and walking along the gravel rail bed

notable_agents.action: two men sitting on a wooden loading platform next to cargo crates
man in blue shirt walking toward the camera along the tracks

entered.detail: curving railway tracks with wooden ties and gravel bed
low wooden dock structure for loading cargo
stacked wooden boxes and crates on the platform
large two-story wooden train station with dark roof

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends from the riverbank to the railway level, revealing train tracks curving into the distance. Two men sit on a wooden loading platform to the left surrounded by crates, while another man walks toward the camera along the tracks. The large wooden station building becomes visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open railway track alongside station platform

events.description: passes the pedestrian walking in the opposite direction
passes man in suit standing on the station platform

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the train tracks past the station platform

notable_agents.action: man in work clothes walking past the camera on the tracks
man in dark suit standing on the wooden platform observing the surroundings

entered.detail: tall piles of cut timber and wooden planks
various wooden boxes and cargo containers stacked along the tracks

segments.scene_description: Walking along the gravel train tracks, the camera passes a man walking in the opposite direction, then moves past a well-dressed man standing on the raised platform. Large stacks of lumber and wooden crates line the platform area as the station building grows larger on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden station platform with lumber storage

events.description: steps onto the wooden station platform from the gravel tracks

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden platform past stacks of lumber and cargo

notable_agents.action: man in brown coat and hat standing near the lumber crates

entered.detail: white wooden siding with dark trim and decorative woodwork
simple wooden seating against the station wall
framed poster showing railway schedules for West Elizabeth Co.
colorful red poster for New Hanover Brewing Co. lager beer
stacked traveling trunks and cargo boxes on the platform

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto the wooden planks of the station platform, passing tall stacks of lumber and various cargo crates. The detailed facade of the station building comes into view, featuring wooden benches and framed posters on the white siding. A worker stands near the lumber on the left.

events.description: stops walking to examine the Official Time Tables poster
pans left to examine the New Hanover Brewing Company poster

agents.ego_description: slowing to examine the detailed posters on the station wall, reading the train schedules and advertisements

entered.detail: painted sign reading ANNESBURG on the station wall
diamond-patterned glass window with dark frame

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at the station wall to closely inspect the vintage posters. It zooms in on the 'Official Time Tables' for the West Elizabeth Co. Railway, then pans to the colorful 'New Hanover Brewing Co' beer advertisement, finally revealing the 'ANNESBURG' sign painted on the building as the camera pulls back slightly.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a polluted riverbank up to the detailed facade of a rustic railway station. It begins at the water's edge among rainbow-colored oil slicks and rocky debris, moving forward past wooden posts toward a forested embankment. As the camera ascends to the railway level, the view opens to curving tracks and workers lounging near crates, before gliding past pedestrians and stacks of lumber that line the path. The scene then shifts onto the wooden planks of the station platform, passing cargo and benches as the white siding of the building comes into full view. Finally, the camera stops at the station wall to closely inspect vintage railway timetables and beer advertisements before pulling back to reveal the painted Annesburg sign.
